return(function(s,y,h,N,R,j,b,O,A,x,C,B,l,q,H,P,V,n,r,F,D,g,i,G,u,z)u,g,l,i,H,r,A,q,F,P,z,O,G,n,x,D,C,V,B=function(s,k)local y=x(k)local h=function(h,N,R,j,b,C,q,n)return l(s,{h;N,R;j;b;C;q,n},k,y)end
